title: Historical Workspace Planning Demotion
objective: Demote the remaining repo-owned early workspace planning documents that still presented themselves as active live governance or status surfaces even after standalone repo cutover and later authority normalization.
dependency_note: After Packet 102 closed the parent-root `.claude` entrypoint layer, the next remaining current-looking residue sat inside the canonical repo itself: older workspace planning documents still described themselves as active live baselines and one still preserved the parent-root git boundary as if it were current truth. Those docs needed explicit historical demotion rather than continued silent coexistence with the current authority chain.
execution_scope: Retitle the early workspace master-plan, structure-audit, and workspace-current-status docs as historical pre-cutover snapshots.
Add explicit historical notes and current-routing blocks at the top of those docs.
Preserve the deeper body content as provenance instead of rewriting the earlier planning record wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad historical-content rewrite beyond top demotion and routing context
success_criteria: The three touched workspace planning docs now lead as historical pre-cutover snapshots rather than active live governance surfaces.
Each touched document now includes an explicit historical note and current-routing block.
The preserved parent-root git-boundary wording in the old workspace-current-status doc is explicitly marked as historical provenance rather than current guidance.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and moves the next lane deeper into older packet-history and legacy planning residue.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path docs/architecture/WORKSPACE-MASTER-PLAN-2026-04-21.md -Pattern '^# Historical Workspace Master Plan','^Status: Historical pre-cutover planning snapshot','^Historical planning note:','^Current routing:'

Select-String -Path docs/architecture/WORKSPACE-STRUCTURE-GOVERNANCE-AUDIT-2026-04-21.md -Pattern '^# Historical Workspace Structure And Governance Audit','^Status: Historical pre-cutover cleanup and organization audit snapshot','^Historical audit note:','^Current routing:'

Select-String -Path docs/architecture/WORKSPACE-CURRENT-STATUS-2026-04-21.md -Pattern '^# Historical Workspace Current Status','^Status: Historical pre-cutover status snapshot','^Historical status note:','^Current routing:'
Select-String -Path docs/architecture/WORKSPACE-CURRENT-STATUS-2026-04-21.md -Pattern 'parent-root git authority still sat at `C:/APEX Platform` in this historical snapshot'
next_action: Return repo-foundation routing to older packet-history and legacy planning surfaces that still preserve pre-cutover operator wording without equivalent current-routing context.
